channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Demi Lovato @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-05-12 03:00 — Demi Lovato at Chase Center. Demi Lovato's tour promises a strong pop spectacle with a compelling narrative of personal growth.

item.title: Florence + The Machine @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-05-16 02:30 — Florence + The Machine at Chase Center. Florence + The Machine is known for their powerful live performances and emotional depth.

item.title: RAYE @ The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-11 02:00 — RAYE at The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. RAYE is generating buzz with her new music and is known for her engaging live shows.

item.title: Yellowcard @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-28 02:00 — Yellowcard at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Yellowcard's nostalgia factor combined with their energetic performances makes this a must-see.

item.title: Joyce Manor @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-16 02:00 — Joyce Manor at The Fillmore. Joyce Manor is a beloved indie band with a reputation for high-energy shows.

item.title: The Afghan Whigs @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-20 02:30 — The Afghan Whigs at The Fillmore. The Afghan Whigs' anniversary tour with Mercury Rev promises a unique blend of alt-rock nostalgia.

item.title: Lagwagon @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-17 02:00 → 2026-05-18 02:00 — Lagwagon at The Fillmore. Lagwagon's celebration of their legacy in punk rock is sure to resonate with fans.

item.title: hemlocke springs @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-21 03:00 — hemlocke springs at The Fillmore. hemlocke springs is gaining traction in the indie scene with their fresh sound.

item.title: The Adicts @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-24 03:00 — The Adicts at The Fillmore. Kevin Morby is known for his captivating performances and storytelling through music.

item.title: Mt. Joy @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-23 03:00 — Mt. Joy at The Fillmore. Mt. Joy's anniversary tour is a celebration of their journey, promising a heartfelt performance.

item.title: TK from Ling tosite sigure @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-27 03:00 — TK from Ling tosite sigure at The Fillmore. TK from Ling tosite sigure brings a unique blend of rock and electronic elements to their shows.

item.title: Hayley Williams @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-05-11 02:00 — Hayley Williams at Fox Theater - Oakland. Hayley Williams' event adds an exciting twist with a unique theme, appealing to her fanbase.

item.title: The Midnight @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-05-15 03:00 — The Midnight at Fox Theater - Oakland. The Midnight is known for their engaging live performances that blend nostalgia with modern sounds.

item.title: Julien Dore @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-05-18 02:30 — Julien Dore at Fox Theater - Oakland. Julien Doré's unique sound and artistic vision make him a compelling live act.

item.title: Wavy Gravys Birthday Bash @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-05-17 02:00 — Wavy Gravys Birthday Bash at The Masonic. Wavy Gravy's birthday bash combines music and philanthropy, creating a unique event.

item.title: Dry Cleaning @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-05-21 03:00 — Dry Cleaning at August Hall. Echo & the Bunnymen's legacy in the post-punk scene ensures a memorable performance.

item.title: Rene Liu @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-05-17 02:00 — Rene Liu at SAP Center at San Jose.

item.title: The Last Dinner Party @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-05-28 03:00 — The Last Dinner Party at Fox Theater - Oakland.
